leadText: The Red Flute (Japanese: あかいビードロ Red Vidro) is a type of medicine introduced in Generation III. It is one of the flutes.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation III to IV 1.2 Generation V and Pokémon X and Y 1.3 Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation III to IV [ edit | edit source ] When used in battle, it snaps a Pokémon out of infatuation . Generation V and Pokémon X and Y [ edit | edit source ] The Red Flute serves no practical purpose other than to be sold . Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire [ edit | edit source ] When used in battle, it snaps a Pokémon out of infatuation.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods R S E Route 113 Glass Workshop (500 steps) FR LG Trade Colo XD Trade D P Pt Trade HG SS Lake of Rage B W Route 13 (treasure hunter) B2 W2 Route 13 (treasure hunter) X Y Trade OR AS Route 113 Glass Workshop (500 grams)

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description R S E A glass flute that snaps Pok é mon out of attraction. FR LG A red glass flute that snaps one Pok é mon out of infatuation. Colo A glass flute that snaps a Pok é mon 's attraction. XD A glass flute that snaps a Pok é mon out of attraction. D P Pt HG SS A red flute made from blown glass. Its melody snaps a single Pokémon out of infatuation. B W B2 W2 A toy flute made from red glass. A maniac will buy it for a high price. X Y A lovely toy flute to admire. It's made from red glass. OR AS S M US UM A flute made from red glass that snaps Pokémon out of infatuation. P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A flute made from red glass. It snaps Pokémon out of infatuation.

sections.title: In the core series games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.2.1 Generation III to IV 1.2.2 Generation V and Pokémon X and Y 1.2.3 Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire 1.3 Description 1.4 Acquisition In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Price [ edit | edit source ] Games Cost Sell price R S E FR LG D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS N/A $ 100 S M US UM N/A $ 10 In the Generation V games, the Red Flute can be sold to the billionaire maniac in Undella Town for $ 7500. Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation III to IV [ edit | edit source ] When used in battle, it snaps a Pokémon out of infatuation . Generation V and Pokémon X and Y [ edit | edit source ] The Red Flute serves no practical purpose other than to be sold . Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire [ edit | edit source ] When used in battle, it snaps a Pokémon out of infatuation.
